title: Women's chronic medication goes missing from car
description: GEORGE NEWS - A woman from George is...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A woman from George is desperately looking for her chronic medication that was allegedly stolen from her car earlier this week.


> According to Karen Scholes, she had just picked up her medication from Dischem in the CBD when she stopped in Ironside Road to do some shopping.


"I just popped into one of the shops quickly to buy some things before I went home. When I got back to my car the driver's side door was ajar. I thought it was a bit weird, but everything seemed fine. It was only when I was driving home that I realised my medicine was not in the car anymore," she said.

The medicine is wrapped in a Dischem packet and is most probably of no use to anyone else.

Scholes is appealing to the public to contact her in the event that someone might have picked up her medicine.


> She can be contacted on 082 378 0513.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
